nasb.text: For if you forgive others for their transgressions, your heavenly Father will also forgive you.

esv.text: For if you forgive others their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you,

cnv.text: 如果你們饒恕別人的過犯，你們的天父也必饒恕你們。

ccb.text: “如果你们饶恕别人的过犯，你们的天父也必饶恕你们的过犯。

csbs.text: “要知道，你们如果饶恕别人的过犯，你们的天父也会饶恕你们。
